cold_start_progress.trend: First user engagement after 8 silent L3 cycles. User drove v2.2 infrastructure upgrade + checkpoint protection protocol. Engine now has real behavioral data to learn from.
cold_start_progress.next_milestone: Continue checkpoint-protected execution during cold start. Graduation needs 15 more user interactions.

contextualize.situation: L3第9轮激活。重大状态变化：4条用户交互(首次真实用户参与)，用户指令驱动v2.2冷启动协议升级。决策日志从1条(系统初始化)→5条。引擎从0交互真空进入主动用户对话。pachong-master v2.0反检测+moni v1.1 WFO已自主执行并git提交(73a9137)。
contextualize.active_goal: G-2026-06-15-002: 瞭望哨兵 + 检查点保护执行
top_3_concerns: cebpubservice.com 502 — 服务器级封锁，需住宅代理IP（非TLS/指纹问题）
wanxia SQLite WAL文件修改未checkpoint — 数据丢失风险
moni回测引擎可引入GT-Score + Island Volume Selection 强化反过拟合

diagnose.continuity_detail: pachong-master v2.0 反检测升级有1项未完成(cebpubservice 502需代理IP)。moni v1.1 WFO引擎已提交但可强化(GT-Score)。
diagnose.quality_detail: pachong-master v2.0 anti_detect.py + browser_crawler.py + 3数据源重写已提交。测试38/42通过(4 PII masker Windows GBK编码，非本次引入)。
diagnose.opportunity_detail: GT-Score抗过拟合目标函数(98%泛化改进)、Island Volume Selection(参数高原选择)、ChromiumFish(persona seeds)均为未应用的新方法论。
diagnose.risk_detail: wanxia SQLite WAL未checkpoint(数据丢失风险)。pachong-master cebpubservice 502未解决(单源阻塞，非全局风险)。~100+文件仍未全部纳入版本控制。
diagnose.primary_diagnosis: 引擎从0交互真空转入主动用户对话——状态质变。研究储备充足(自主Agent+爬虫反检测+量化回测三领域)。当前最高价值行动：爬虫cebpubservice代理解决(P0) + moni GT-Score集成(P1)。

queries: Playwright stealth anti-detection 2026 browser fingerprint evasion
walk forward optimization Monte Carlo backtesting 2026 quantitative finance
autonomous coding agent architecture 2026 multi-agent harness self-improving
key_findings: AHE (Agentic Harness Engineering): closed-loop harness evolution, three-pillar observability, each edit = falsifiable contract, +7.3% Terminal-Bench 2
HarnessX: 9-dimensional taxonomy, AEGIS trace-driven evolution, harness-model co-evolution +14.5% across 5 benchmarks
Adaptive Auto-Harness: harness tree + solve-time routing for open-ended task streams, evolution loss vs adaptation loss decomposition
Code as Agent Harness survey: 42-author, 3-layer framework (interface/mechanisms/scaling)
GT-Score: anti-overfitting objective, 98% generalization improvement, 56% higher Monte Carlo, embeds generalization into optimization
Island Volume Selection: parameter plateaus over peaks, clusters profitable sets, robust to noise
ChromiumFish: C++ persona seeds, internally consistent fingerprint across all signals
Fingerprint consistency insight: #1 detection cause = mismatched fingerprints (UA vs navigator.platform)
research.note: 3 queries across 3 domains, all yielded genuinely new findings not in prior 7 research cycles. AHE/HarnessX/Adaptive Auto-Harness are June 2026 hot-off-the-arXiv. GT-Score published Jan 2026 in JRFM — previously missed.

deliberate.q1_detail: 用户明确指令: 引擎基础设施升级+v2.2检查点保护协议。已执行完毕(88文件提交)。当前L3是标准心跳激活——用户期望引擎持续瞭望+在检查点保护下自主优化。
deliberate.q2_detail: cebpubservice 502阻塞需代理解决——但CCGP双源日产~1000条足以支撑商机筛选，非24h紧急。GT-Score集成是强化而非修复。
deliberate.q3_detail: 所有规划行动均为可逆操作(文件写入、配置修改、测试运行)。无push/deploy/destroy。
deliberate.q4_detail: 已注册13个模式，已验证accuracy=1.0的模式: infrastructure:plan:infrastructure:engine_bootstrap, infrastructure:goal_completion:goal_achieved, cold_start:scout:workspace_hygiene, scout:infrastructure:scan:no_delta, l3:infrastructure:archive:batch_case_sync, cold_start_exhaustion, infrastructure:git:commit_autonomous_work。样本量小(n=1-2)统计意义有限，但均无负面反馈。
deliberate.q5_detail: 本周期行动: 校准更新+案例归档+研究记录——全为文件写入，git可回滚。失败成本极低。
key_considerations: 用户首次交互后引擎应展示响应能力——研究更新+扫描发现+建议输出形成完整L3报告
calibration更新和案例归档是引擎基础设施维护——确保跨会话状态连续性
cebpubservice 502 + GT-Score集成 + wanxia WAL 是3个可操作发现——写入建议供用户评估
研究产出(AHE/HarnessX/GT-Score/ChromiumFish)在3个领域均有新突破——记录到l3_findings供未来引用

confidence_breakdown.pattern_match_detail: l3:infrastructure:archive:batch_case_sync (accuracy 1.0), cold_start:scout:workspace_hygiene (accuracy 1.0), scout:infrastructure:scan:no_delta (accuracy 1.0) — 3 patterns strongly match
confidence_breakdown.web_corroboration_detail: 3/3 search domains yielded genuinely new findings (not in prior cycles). GT-Score from JRFM peer-reviewed journal — high credibility.
confidence_breakdown.risk_assessment_detail: All planned operations are reversible file writes. No project code modification. No push/deploy/destroy.
confidence_breakdown.user_preference_alignment_detail: User actively engaged with engine (4 interactions), explicitly directed infrastructure work. L3 deep check + calibration update + archive sync align with user's 'fix infrastructure first' directive.

decide.action_level_justification: All operations are reversible (file writes only). Score 84 >= 71 threshold for ACT_SILENT on reversible operations. Checkpoint protection not needed for calibration/archive writes (pure data files, not code).
decide.decision_summary: L3第9轮：calibration.json新增2026-06-16 l3_findings（4项新研究+健康快照），归档case-006/007/008到decision-archive.md（Cases 10-12），更新引擎时间戳。3个可操作建议写入autonomous-suggestions.md。

写入autonomous-suggestions.md: cebpubservice代理 + GT-Score集成 + wanxia WAL checkpoint

retrospect.new_pattern_discovered: l3:user_engagement_breakthrough: Major state change — first user interaction after prolonged vacuum. Engine correctly transitioned from cold_start_exhaustion OBSERVE to full reconnaissance mode with ACT_SILENT for infrastructure maintenance.
lessons_learned: 用户交互质变应触发引擎行为模式切换——从保守OBSERVE→全面侦察ACT_SILENT(仅限基础设施维护)
WebSearch在长期研究积累后仍需新鲜查询——GT-Score(JRFM Jan 2026)和AHE(Jun 2026)均在前7轮中遗漏，本轮新查询发现
跨子repo git status检查是必要但不够的——需结合PROGRESS.md交叉验证（pachong-master git clean但PROGRESS有pending）
引擎研究储备具有边际递增效应——每轮新查询在前序基础上扩展知识边界(GT-Score是第8轮研究才发现的量化金矿)
L3检查在用户交互恢复后重置降频计数器是正确的——但实际间隔(13h)因主会话CronCreate问题偏离预期
